headline: Top Probate, Estate Planning, & Trusts Attorney
paragraph: For 25+ years, Troy Moore has been the go-to probate expert for Houston families navigating loss, inheritance disputes, and estate planning alone. Your last act of kindness, trust, and respect — and Texas deserves who turns legal complexities into clear, caring plans so it's not a burden. Probate Attorney.

bullets.label: Deep Texas Roots
bullets.description: Licensed since 1999, South Texas College of Law; 25+ years active in the Texas Bar Association.

bullets.label: 2,800+ Complex Cases Handled
bullets.description: From simple estate administration to high-stakes guardianship battles.

bullets.label: No Jargon, Just Justice
bullets.description: Translates probate law into plain English so you understand every step.

bullets.label: Aggressive When Needed
bullets.description: Known for resolving complex disputes that others walk away from.

quote: My goal isn't just to win cases — it's to give families stability during life's toughest transitions.
